'''鈭歞-k-k-sh''' ('''kadakeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tiptoe|tiptoe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tiptoe|tiptoe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-k-k-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kadakeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidakeshoko|thidakeshoko]] || [[word:jidakeshoko|jidakeshoko]] || [[word:shidakeshoko|shidakeshoko]] || [[word:kidakeshoko|kidakeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudakeshoko|thuthudakeshoko]] || [[word:jujudakeshoko|jujudakeshoko]] || [[word:shushudakeshoko|shushudakeshoko]] || [[word:kukudakeshoko|kukudakeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudakeshoko|thudakeshoko]] || [[word:judakeshoko|judakeshoko]] || [[word:shudakeshoko|shudakeshoko]] || [[word:kudakeshoko|kudakeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudakeshoko|thudakeshoko]] || [[word:judakeshoko|judakeshoko]] || [[word:shudakeshoko|shudakeshoko]] || [[word:kudakeshoko|kudakeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedakeshoko|thedakeshoko]] || [[word:jedakeshoko|jedakeshoko]] || [[word:shedakeshoko|shedakeshoko]] || [[word:kedakeshoko|kedakeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodakeshoko|thothodakeshoko]] || [[word:jojodakeshoko|jojodakeshoko]] || [[word:shoshodakeshoko|shoshodakeshoko]] || [[word:kokodakeshoko|kokodakeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodakeshoko|thodakeshoko]] || [[word:jodakeshoko|jodakeshoko]] || [[word:shodakeshoko|shodakeshoko]] || [[word:kodakeshoko|kodakeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodakeshoko|thodakeshoko]] || [[word:jodakeshoko|jodakeshoko]] || [[word:shodakeshoko|shodakeshoko]] || [[word:kodakeshoko|kodakeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dakeshoko|th忙dakeshoko]] || [[word:j忙dakeshoko|j忙dakeshoko]] || [[word:sh忙dakeshoko|sh忙dakeshoko]] || [[word:k忙dakeshoko|k忙dakeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadakeshoko|thathadakeshoko]] || [[word:jajadakeshoko|jajadakeshoko]] || [[word:shashadakeshoko|shashadakeshoko]] || [[word:kakadakeshoko|kakadakeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadakeshoko|thadakeshoko]] || [[word:jadakeshoko|jadakeshoko]] || [[word:shadakeshoko|shadakeshoko]] || [[word:kadakeshoko|kadakeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadakeshoko|thadakeshoko]] || [[word:jadakeshoko|jadakeshoko]] || [[word:shadakeshoko|shadakeshoko]] || [[word:kadakeshoko|kadakeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
